title: Property Consultant - Synergy Property Development - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Synergy Property Development - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Synergy Property Development, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Property Consultant for our Kanpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Synergy Property Development:
Synergy Property Development is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Synergy Property Development!
